zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaïde d'Avesnes於1180年10月10日出生在法國諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾艾維斯-素-爾-素德時，她的父親Jacques d'AVESNES30歲，母親Adeline de Guise25歲。她於1236年與Roger de Rosoy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1239年12月4日在法國享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaïde d'Avesnes于1180年10月10日出生在法国諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾艾維斯-素-爾-素德时，她的父亲Jacques d'AVESNES30岁，母亲Adeline de Guise25岁。她于1236年与Roger de Rosoy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1239年12月4日在法国享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adelaïde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaïde d'Avesnes was born on 10 October 1180, in Avesnes-sur-Helpe-Sud, Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, France, her father, Jacques d'AVESNES, was 30 and her mother, Adeline de Guise, was 25. She married Roger de Rosoy in 1236. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 4 December 1239, in France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaïde d'Avesnes est née le 10 octobre 1180, à Avesnes-sur-Helpe-Sud, Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, France, son père, Jacques d'AVESNES, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Guise, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Rosoy en 1236. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 décembre 1239, à France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaïde d'Avesnes am 10. Oktober 1180 in Avesnes-sur-Helpe-Sud, Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jacques d'AVESNES 30 und ihre Mutter Adeline de Guise 25. Sie hat 1236 Roger de Rosoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Dezember 1239 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaïde d'Avesnes è nata il il 10 ottobre 1180 nel Avesnes-sur-Helpe-Sud, Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Francia, sua padre, Jacques d'AVESNES, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Adeline de Guise, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Rosoy nel 1236. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 dicembre 1239, nel Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaïde d'Avesnesが1180年10月10日にフランスノードエイベスネス-スル-ヘルペエイベスネス-スル-ヘルペ-スドで生まれた時，父Jacques d'AVESNESは30歳，母Adeline de Guiseは25歳であった。1236年にRoger de Rosoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1239年12月4日にフランスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaïde d'Avesnes(이)가 1180년 10월 10일 프랑스 노르드 에베스네스-수-헬프 에베스네스-수-헬p-수드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jacques d'AVESNES(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeline de Guise(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1236년 Roger de Rosoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1239년 12월 4일 프랑스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaïde d'Avesnes nasceu em 10 de outubro de 1180, em Avesnes-sur-Helpe-Sud, Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, França, seu pai, Jacques d'AVESNES, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adeline de Guise, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Rosoy em 1236. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1239, em França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaïde d'Avesnes родилась 10 октября 1180 г. в местности авеснес-сур-хелпе-суд, авеснес-сур-хелп, норд, Франция, её отцу по имени Jacques d'AVESNES было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Guise, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Rosoy в 1236 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 декабря 1239 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 59 лет.
